# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official lightweight Ubuntu image
FROM ubuntu:latest

# Set working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Copy application code from Docker context into the container
COPY . /app

# Install dependencies and packages
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y libpq-dev postgresql-client redis-tools nginx curl

# Expose ports for web server, API server, database, and Redis
EXPOSE 80:80
EXPOSE 8080:8080
EXPOSE 5432:5432
EXPOSE 6379:6379

# Run application in daemon mode when container starts
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
